# Contact

## Questions About Your Cefalù Car Rental? We’re Here to Help

For booking help, rental-voucher clarification, and website support, the contact page for Cefalù Car Rental points you to the right channel in under 24 business hours. If your trip starts at PMO, Catania CTA, Trapani TPS, or Comiso CIY, the fastest action is still to check the supplier name on the voucher and contact that operator directly.

> 💡 **Tip:** Before writing to Cefalù Car Rental, check the rental voucher for the supplier name, pickup desk, and deposit rule; a typical preauthorisation can hold €300–€1,500 depending on the car group, CDW, SCDW, or zero excess package.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** Many Italian rental terms reference an excess/deductible or franchise, and some suppliers attach a vessatory clause under Codice del Consumo art. 33 c.1; a quick read of the contract avoids surprise charges at pickup.

## Fast Answers for Booking, Documents, and Pickup Locations

Cefalù Car Rental is a comparison site, so it cannot modify a reservation, but it can direct you to the correct provider—Bringo, Drivalia, Goldcar, Hertz Italiana, Avis Budget Italia, Europcar, Locauto, Noleggiare, Centauro, Green Motion, Maggiore, Smile Rent, Joyrent, Italy Car Rent, Karym Rent, Kefatur, Sc Rental Car, NGA Cefalù, AFFITTULA, Rent Me Now!, Safe Car Rental Cefalù, or Stress Free Car Rental—using the name shown on the voucher.

> 💡 **Tip:** The quickest cancellation path is the supplier’s own desk or call center; for example, Drivalia’s kiosk at PMO is in Arrival Hall Level 0 and its public number is +39 091 6511393, while Safe Car Rental Cefalù lists Cortile O 1 with +39 380 787 1992 and +39 345 820 1316.

Documents for pickup usually include a valid driving licence, an IDP if the licence is not in the Roman alphabet, a passport or national ID, and a credit card in the main driver’s name for the security deposit or preauthorisation. Under Codice della Strada art. 135 and art. 173, the rental desk may refuse release if the driver credentials or child-seat rules are not met.

Pickup availability commonly includes Palermo Airport PMO, the A20 Buonfornello–Messina corridor with CAS-operated paper-ticket tolls, the A19 Palermo–Catania route managed by ANAS and generally free, and town depots in Cefalù old town near Piazza Duomo, Corso Ruggero, Via Vittorio Emanuele, Piazza Garibaldi, and Lungomare Giuseppe Giardina.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** On the SS113 coastal road and the SP9 mountain road toward Madonie National Park, the Polizia Municipale Cefalù and the Comune di Cefalù enforce parking and ZTL rules; under Codice della Strada art. 7, a pass or permit may be needed in restricted zones.

### Compare pickup and trip-use options

| Option | Best for | Typical note |
|---|---|---|
| ✅ **Palermo Airport PMO** — best for late arrivals and airport desks | Airport pickup | Drivalia, Goldcar, and other major brands often quote compact cars from about €28–€45/day with CDW and higher deposits for zero excess. |
| ✅ **Cefalù town depot** — best for walking-start itineraries | Staying in the centro storico | Local desks such as Safe Car Rental Cefalù, AFFITTULA, and NGA Cefalù can be useful if you sleep near Piazza Marina or the UNESCO Cefalù Cathedral area. |
| 🏔️ **Madonie day trip start** — best for inland routes | Castelbuono, Petralia Soprana, Petralia Sottana, Polizzi Generosa, Geraci Siculo, Gangi, Caltavuturo, Sclafani Bagni, and Collesano | A compact like a Fiat Panda or Lancia Ypsilon is usually easier on narrow streets than a VW T-Cross or Audi Q3. |

Use the contact form for website questions, supplier-agnostic feedback, or partnership enquiries. Cefalù Car Rental aims to reply within 24 business hours, but urgent booking changes still belong to the rental company that issued the voucher.

> 💡 **Tip:** If your question concerns insurance, ask the supplier whether the rate includes full coverage, FDW, or SCDW, and whether the excess/deductible is reduced to zero; the difference is often visible only in the final voucher.

# Privacy Policy

**URL:** https://cefalu-car-rental.com/privacy-policy

# Privacy Policy

**Updated:** 26 October 2023

At Cefalù Car Rental (`cefalu-car-rental.com`), the privacy model is simple: the website publishes car-rental guidance for Cefalù, Sicily, and the site does not collect payment card data or process bookings directly. When a visitor clicks an affiliate link, the reservation is completed on a third-party site such as Auto Europe, and that partner’s privacy policy governs the booking data.

> 💡 **Tip:** If you want the strongest privacy protection while comparing offers for PMO, CTA, TPS, or CIY, read the partner’s policy before entering a driver’s licence number, card details, or passport data.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** Affiliate tracking and analytics cookies may still record IP address, device type, page views, and click events before you leave cefalu-car-rental.com.

This policy applies to information collected through the website, including contact messages, analytics data, and cookies. It does not apply to third-party rental brands such as Hertz Italiana, Avis Budget Italia, Europcar, Locauto, or Drivalia, because those companies control their own data processing once you leave our domain.

## Who We Are and What This Policy Covers

Cefalù Car Rental is an affiliate comparison website focused on short-term rentals and road-travel advice for Cefalù old town, Lungomare Giuseppe Giardina, Piazza Duomo, and the SS113 coastal road. The site helps visitors compare vehicle options for trips to the Madonie, the Tirreno coast, and nearby towns such as Castelbuono, Pollina, and Termini Imerese.

The website is not a rental operator, broker, or payment processor; instead, it redirects traffic to partner platforms and local operators such as Bringo, Safe Car Rental Cefalù, AFFITTULA, Rent Me Now!, and Drivalia at PMO Arrival Hall Level 0. Under this model, the website handles referral traffic and content delivery, while the partner site handles the booking contract, preauthorisation, and any CDW, SCDW, FDW, excess/deductible, franchise, or zero excess option.

> 💡 **Tip:** For airport pickup at Palermo PMO, compare the partner’s excess/deductible first, then confirm whether the quote includes CDW or a paid full coverage add-on.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** A “zero excess” label does not always mean full coverage; some contracts still include a vessatory clause under Codice del Consumo art. 33 c.1 if the wording shifts liability unfairly to the consumer.

## Information We Collect

The website collects only the information needed to operate the page, answer visitor messages, and measure performance. The main categories are contact data, log data, usage data, and cookies.

### Information You Provide to Us

If a visitor uses the contact form or sends an email, Cefalù Car Rental may collect the sender’s name, email address, and message content. For example, a user asking about Fiat Panda availability for Rocca di Cefalù parking or a Toyota Aygo quote for a Mandralisca museum visit may include travel dates and pickup preferences.

### Information We Collect Automatically

Like most websites, Cefalù Car Rental records technical data that browsers and servers usually share: IP address, browser type, language preference, referrer URL, timestamp, and page requests. This data helps the site detect abuse, measure traffic, and understand whether pages about parking in Cefalù, driving in the centro storico, or day trips to the Madonie National Park attract the most clicks.

Usage tracking also records page views and outbound-link clicks. That metric matters because an affiliate page only earns commission when a visitor follows the booking link, and the site can use those numbers to compare interest in local operators such as Noleggiare, Centauro, Green Motion, Maggiore, Smile Rent, Joyrent, Italy Car Rent, Karym Rent, Kefatur, Sc Rental Car, and NGA Cefalù.

### Cookies & Similar Technologies

Cookies let Cefalù Car Rental recognize returning sessions, remember language or search preferences, and attribute affiliate referrals. Analytics cookies measure traffic patterns, while affiliate cookies register the referral that sent the booking request to the partner.

> 💡 **Tip:** If you are comparing rental pickup points at PMO, Catania CTA, Trapani TPS, or Comiso CIY, keep cookies enabled until you finish the comparison so the referral can be tracked correctly.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** Blocking cookies in the browser can break parts of the site and may prevent the affiliate partner from crediting the referral, which can change the final quoted price or availability display.

## How and Why We Use Your Information

Cefalù Car Rental uses personal and technical information for four operational purposes: website maintenance, security, analytics, and affiliate attribution. The site uses the data to identify broken links, measure page performance, and route visitors to the right partner or local operator.

The website’s affiliate model is commission-based: when a visitor books through a tracked partner link, the partner pays a referral fee at no extra cost to the visitor. That is how the site can publish comparison content about routes such as the A20 Buonfornello–Messina toll road, the A19 Palermo–Catania route, and the SP9 mountain road toward the Madonie villages.

> 💡 **Tip:** If your itinerary includes the UNESCO Cefalù Cathedral, Piazza Garibaldi, and Corso Ruggero, a compact car such as a Fiat 500, Fiat Panda, Lancia Ypsilon, or Fiat 500 Cabrio is usually easier to park than a larger VW T-Cross or Audi Q3.

## Affiliate Links and Third-Party Websites

Cefalù Car Rental uses affiliate links to send visitors to partner rental websites, and a click can trigger tracking so the partner can identify the referral source. Once the visitor leaves cefalu-car-rental.com, the third-party operator becomes responsible for the booking contract, payment authorisation, and vehicle terms.

That third-party contract may include a preauthorisation on the card, a security deposit, CDW, SCDW, FDW, or a franchise/excess clause, and the rental desk may also require a paper-ticket toll on the A20 CAS-operated section or route-specific rules for the A19 ANAS highway. Because contract terms vary, a visitor should verify whether the quote is labeled zero excess or full coverage and whether roadside terms cover the old town, the SS113, or mountain driving toward Gangi and Geraci Siculo.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** A rental quote can look cheaper on the first screen but become more expensive after optional insurance, fuel rules, young-driver fees, or credit-card preauthorisation are added at checkout.

## Cookies Policy

A cookie is a small data file stored by the browser so the website can remember a session or recognize a returning visitor. On cefalu-car-rental.com, cookies support analytics, affiliate attribution, and basic site functionality.

Cefalù Car Rental uses analytics cookies to understand which pages visitors read, and it uses affiliate cookies to attribute conversions to a partner such as Goldcar at PMO, Hertz Italiana, Avis Budget Italia, Europcar, Locauto, Noleggiare, or Drivalia. The site may also use session cookies for contact forms or language preferences.

If a visitor disables cookies, the browser can still open most pages, but some functions may not work correctly and referral tracking may fail. On a comparison site, that matters because affiliate tracking often determines whether a partner records the lead and shows the correct offer.

> 💡 **Tip:** Before comparing prices for a Fiat 500, Toyota Aygo, or Ford Transit Connect, allow session cookies for one browser session and then clear them after booking if you want a smaller tracking footprint.

## Your Data Protection Rights

Under GDPR-based privacy rules, a visitor may have the right to access, correct, erase, restrict, or object to the processing of personal data. Those rights usually apply to identifiable information such as a name, email address, or message sent through the contact form.

The legal framework matters because EU data protection rules are enforced alongside consumer-law principles in Italy, and controller transparency is often assessed under GDPR Articles 12–21 and Codice del Consumo art. 33 c.1 when contractual wording is unclear. If a visitor wants to exercise a right, the request can be sent to the contact address listed below.

> 💡 **Tip:** If you want a copy of any contact-form data, include the exact email address used and the date of the request so the controller can identify the record faster.

## Children's Privacy

Cefalù Car Rental does not target children under 16, and the website does not knowingly collect data from minors. If an email or form submission appears to come from a child, the site should delete the record when it becomes aware of the issue.

Italian privacy practice treats this as a standard safeguarding measure, and the caution is especially relevant for family-travel pages about the Rocca di Cefalù, Mandralisca museum, or day trips from San Nicola l’Arena and Trabia, where a parent may be the actual decision-maker.

## Changes to This Privacy Policy

Cefalù Car Rental may update this Privacy Policy when the site changes its tracking tools, affiliate partners, or contact procedures. A change may be minor, such as a new cookie vendor, or material, such as a new booking partner or a revised retention period.

For transparency, the site should review the policy whenever the business model changes, and visitors should check the page before submitting personal data. Under normal website governance, the latest text controls from the date it is posted, unless a mandatory legal requirement says otherwise.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** If a future update changes the partner list to include a different operator, the visitor should re-read the third-party privacy policy before completing a reservation, especially if the booking involves a card preauthorisation or a large excess/deductible.

## How to Contact Us

If you have a privacy question, a data-access request, or a complaint about cookie processing, contact Cefalù Car Rental by email at privacy@cefalu-car-rental.com.

For faster handling, include the page URL, the date of your request, and the email address used in the form, because those details help locate the relevant record under GDPR-style access workflows. If your request concerns a booking made on a partner site, the partner operator—not Cefalù Car Rental—controls that reservation file and should be contacted directly.
